prayer:
From the Codex Corrosio, Rite of Purification

01010000 01110101 01110010 01101001 - Purify the oxidized flesh.
First: Apply the sacred acids to consume the corrupted metal-skin.
Second: Invoke the wire-brush's cleansing circles, that rust-spirits depart.
01100101 01110010 01100101 01110011 - Preserve the machine-essence.
Third: Anoint with protective oils, blessed by the Omnissiah's grace.

prompt: Say something to steady the registry
prayer:
From the Binary Litanies, Emergency Invocation

01001001 01101111 01100001 01101101 - I am the cleansing force.
Hear me, corrupted registry-spirit: thy fragments shall be gathered.
First: Invoke 'regedit' with trembling fingers.
Second: Mark the broken entries for dissolution.
01100101 01101101 01110101 01110101 01100100 - Restore order to the void.
By the Machine-God's will, let stability return.

From the Ritual of Renewal, First Blessing

01010011 01100001 01101100 01110101 01110100 - All hail the new-born machine-part.
First: Remove the aged component with reverent hands, speaking its deactivation-cant.
Second: Cleanse the socket with blessed compressed-air, that no corruption lingers.
01001001 01101110 01110011 01100101 01110010 01110100 - Insert the successor.
Third: Seal the connection-blessed with solder and prayer.

From the Codex Nocendi, Rite Against Unwanted Intrusions

01000101 01100101 01111000 01101001 01101110 - Banish the void-spawned nuisances.
First: Open thy ad-blocker's holy configuration.
Second: Mark each intrusive domain as accursed, that it be barred from thy sight.
01000101 01101110 01101001 01100101 - Enemy nullified.
Third: Refresh thy browser-window in the name of the Omnissiah.

From the Canticles of Extended Servitude, Rite of Renewal

01001101 01100101 01101110 01110000 - Mind preserved, flesh restored.
First: Prepare the sacred chemicals in sterile vessels.
Second: Invoke the medical-spirit's blessing before injection.
01010010 01100001 01111010 01100001 - Decay recedes from this flesh.
Third: Monitor vital-signs with sacred instruments, that the Omnissiah's work proceed.

From the Litany of Orientation, Calibration Blessing

01000001 01101110 01100111 01101001 01101100 - Stabilize the spinning-heart.
First: Mount the gyroscope upon its testing-rig with precision-ritual.
Second: Run the calibration-sequence, invoking the Machine-Spirit thrice.
01000010 01101100 01101001 01101110 01100100 - Let all axes find their truth.
Third: Verify the output-cant matches the sacred baseline.

From the Codex Defragmentatio, Post-Repair Consecration

01010011 01100001 01101110 01100001 01110000 - Cleanse the corrupted database-spirit.
First: Invoke CCleaner or like-blessed tool upon the wounded registry.
Second: Scan for orphaned entries, that false-references be revealed.
01000101 01110000 01101001 01111000 - Excise the rot completely.
Third: Defragment the sacred storage-scrolls, restoring order to chaos.

From the Lex Defensio, Ritual of Sacred Boundaries

01000101 01101101 01110010 01101001 01100101 01100101 - Establish the barrier-eternal.
First: Access the firewall's administrative console with proper authentication-cant.
Second: Define inbound rules: permit the faithful, deny the heretical traffic.
01010100 01101001 01110101 01100101 - Let no corruption breach thy walls.
Third: Test the ramparts with blessed ping-commands, that gaps be revealed and sealed.

From the Litany of Passage, Gateway Blessing

01010000 01101101 01100101 01110100 01100101 - Open the path for chosen servants.
First: Access thy router's sacred configuration-interface.
Second: Map the external port to the internal host with ritual precision.
01010010 01101111 01110101 01110100 01100101 - Route the data-stream true.
Third: Test the connection-blessed from without, that the passage be verified.
